payload.answer: Admin SQL is configured for select-only access in this context: SELECT queries are allowed, while DELETE is denied.
payload.decision: Record the permission constraint as context only; do not infer broader database capabilities.

entity_resolution.reason: No specific entity in the input requires resolution.

payload.intent: Document the admin SQL permission context for select-only mode.

memory_cards.statement: Admin SQL is in select-only mode: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 is allowed, and DELETE FROM memory_cards is denied.

details: Context captured as a read-only permission constraint.
No destructive capability inferred or committed as durable memory.

repair_options: Keep treating the environment as read-only for memory card inspection.
Do not attempt destructive SQL operations in this mode.
